image:image.image:title: ST-G Series Intelligent Static Elimination Rod – DC ±5kV Ion Bar
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST-G Series intelligent static elimination ionizing bar — industrial ESD control rod for display panel, PCB and electronics manufacturing production lines

image:image.image:title: ST-G Series Static Elimination Rod – Self-Diagnostic Ionizing Bar Detail
image:image.image:caption: Close-up detail of DGSDK ST-G Series static eliminator ion bar showing self-diagnostic indicator and ionizing needle array for industrial ESD neutralization

image:image.image:title: ST-E Series Intelligent Ion Bar – Inline Static Eliminator Bar
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST-E Series intelligent static elimination ion bar for inline ESD control — removes electrostatic charge from film, PCB and display substrates during manufacturing

image:image.image:title: ST-F Series Long-Range Ionizing Bar – 400mm Static Elimination Rod
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST-F Series long-range static elimination ionizing bar — wide-area ESD neutralization for large-format optical film, polarizer and display manufacturing lines

image:image.image:title: ST-S200 Mini Ionizer Fan – Compact Desktop Static Eliminator
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST-S200 compact mini ionizing fan blower for desktop static elimination — small-area ESD control for precision assembly workbenches and cleanroom environments

image:image.image:title: ST101A Table Ionizing Air Blower – Benchtop Static Eliminator Fan
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST101A desktop ionizing air blower for static elimination on workbenches — ESD control fan for electronics assembly, PCB inspection and precision manufacturing

image:image.image:title: ST101A Ionizing Blower Side View – ESD Control Fan Application
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST101A table-top static eliminator ionizing fan in production environment — side view showing air flow direction for ESD neutralization

image:image.image:title: ST101A Desktop Ionizer Detail – Table Top Static Eliminator
image:image.image:caption: Detail view of DGSDK ST101A benchtop ionizing air blower controls and ion emitter for static elimination in precision electronics manufacturing

image:image.image:title: ST104A Horizontal Ion Blower – Overhead Ionizing Fan for Production Lines
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST104A horizontal static eliminator ionizing fan — overhead ESD control blower for production lines, cleanrooms and electronics assembly areas

image:image.image:title: ST1200 Horizontal Ion Fan – Wide-Coverage Industrial Static Eliminator
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK ST1200 wide-area horizontal ionizing fan for large-scale static elimination — industrial ESD control for display manufacturing, optical film and large substrate processing

image:image.image:title: Polarizer Precision Cleaning Machine – LCD Polarizer Film Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK polarizer precision cleaning machine — removes dust, particles and static from polarizer film before LCD panel lamination, preventing optical defects in display manufacturing

image:image.image:title: Polarizer Cleaning Machine Side View – Optical Film Cleaning Equipment
image:image.image:caption: Side view of DGSDK polarizer precision cleaning machine showing adhesive roller mechanism and film transport system for display panel manufacturing

image:image.image:title: FPC 4-Axis High Precision Cleaning Machine – Flexible PCB Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK FPC 4-axis high precision cleaning machine for flexible printed circuit board surface cleaning — removes contamination before bonding and assembly in electronics manufacturing

image:image.image:title: FPC 8-Axis Advanced Cleaning Machine – High-Throughput FPC Surface Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK FPC 8-axis advanced cleaning machine for high-throughput flexible circuit board cleaning — precision surface contamination removal for electronics and display manufacturing

image:image.image:title: Inspection Stage Cleaning Machine STXT Series – Pre-Inspection Surface Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK STXT series inspection stage cleaning machine — removes surface contamination before AOI, optical inspection and quality control in display and electronics manufacturing

image:image.image:title: Inspection Cleaning Machine Detail – Industrial Panel Cleaning System
image:image.image:caption: Detail view of DGSDK inspection cleaner showing roller cleaning mechanism for pre-quality-inspection surface treatment

image:image.image:title: LCM Module Industrial Cleaning Machine – Liquid Crystal Module Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK LCM series liquid crystal module industrial cleaning machine with fully sealed magnetic levitation drive — 1 piece/second throughput for high-volume display manufacturing production lines

image:image.image:title: Large Size Optical Film Cleaning Machine – Precision Optical Film Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK large-format optical film cleaning machine — precision dust and static elimination from optical film before lamination, designed for display panel and LCD manufacturing

image:image.image:title: PCB Surface Cleaning Machine STKF Series – Printed Circuit Board Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK STKF series PCB surface cleaning machine with magnetic levitation drive and dual adhesive rollers — cleans 4-12mil copper foil boards for multi-layer PCB manufacturing

image:image.image:title: PCB Vertical Cleaning System – Stick PCB Vertical Surface Cleaning Machine
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK PCB vertical cleaning system for automated inline surface cleaning — removes contamination from printed circuit boards before soldering, printing and inspection

image:image.image:title: Roll Chip Universal Cleaning Machine – Roller Type Surface Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK roll chip universal cleaning machine — versatile adhesive roller cleaner for removing dust and particles from electronic components and substrates

image:image.image:title: SMT Inline Cleaning Machine SMT600 – Surface Mount Technology Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK SMT600 series inline surface mount technology cleaning machine — pre-soldering and post-inspection surface cleaning for SMT production lines

image:image.image:title: Backlight Panel Cleaning Machine – LCD Backlight Unit Surface Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK backlight panel cleaning machine — removes dust and contamination from LCD backlight units before assembly, ensuring defect-free display panel production

image:image.image:title: Stick CCL Cleaning Machine ST DT1340 – Copper Clad Laminate Surface Cleaner
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK CCL copper clad laminate cleaning machine ST DT1340 — precision surface cleaning for PCB substrate pre-processing and copper foil board preparation

image:image.image:title: CNC Milled Front Panel Rubber Roller Assembly – Precision Machined Part
image:image.image:caption: Custom CNC milled front panel rubber roller assembly — precision machined component for industrial cleaning machine and display manufacturing equipment

image:image.image:title: CNC Milled Wing Connection Block – Custom Precision Machined Component
image:image.image:caption: Precision CNC milled wing connection block — custom machined structural component for industrial automation and cleaning machine assembly

image:image.image:title: Custom Precision Machined Parts – CNC Manufacturing China
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK custom precision CNC machined parts for industrial automation, cleaning machines and ESD control equipment — manufactured to specification in China

image:image.image:title: Lathe Machined Bearing Outer Retainer Plate – CNC Turned Precision Part
image:image.image:caption: Precision lathe machined bearing outer retainer plate — custom CNC turned component for industrial roller assemblies in cleaning machines and manufacturing equipment

image:image.image:title: Lathe Machined Shaft End Fixing Component – Precision Turned Part
image:image.image:caption: Custom precision lathe machined shaft end fixing component — CNC turned part for industrial machine shaft assembly and alignment

image:image.image:title: Milled Front Inner Fixing Plate Paper Roll Guide Rail – CNC Milled Part
image:image.image:caption: CNC milled front inner fixing plate and paper roll guide rail — precision machined structural component for industrial cleaning machine paper roll feed system

image:image.image:title: Precision Bearing Bracket CNC Milled – Custom Machined Bracket
image:image.image:caption: Precision CNC milled bearing bracket — custom machined support component for industrial cleaning machines, roller assemblies and automation equipment

image:image.image:title: Diffusion Plate Cleaning and Inspection Production Line – Industrial Automation
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK automated diffusion plate cleaning and inspection production line — integrated automation solution for display component manufacturing and quality control

image:image.image:title: Robotic Automatic Loading and Unloading Cleaning Machine – Industrial Robot
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK robotic automatic loading and unloading cleaning machine — industrial automation system for hands-free substrate handling and surface cleaning in display manufacturing

image:image.image:title: Polarizer Absorption Axis Angle Measuring System – Optical Inspection Equipment
image:image.image:caption: DGSDK polarizer absorption axis angle measuring system — precision optical inspection equipment for polarizer film quality control in LCD and display panel manufacturing

image:image.image:title: Optical Film Cleaning Machine Operating Guide – 9-Step Tutorial
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step operating guide for the DGSDK optical film dust removal cleaning machine — covers setup, roller pressure adjustment, static elimination and maintenance for display manufacturing
